quote_of_day.text: MAI POORI MAANAVTA KO SHRAAP DETA HU MALE TO FEMALE RATIO CHUD JAAYE AUR 4 FEMALE PER MALE HO JAAYE FERTILITY RATE 0.5 HO JAYE SAARE BUDDHO KI HEALTH BAS ITNI THEEK RAHE KI KHUD KI GAAND DHO PAAYE AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of caste hatred intensified over the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent rhetoric against low castes.

The system's leading edge featured calls for beheading, acid attacks, and other forms of brutal violence, sparking a debate that drew in many responders.

A scattered drizzle of livestream-death gossip fell in the afternoon, centered on the tragic death of a 24-year-old erotic model during a livestream. The discussion remained somber, with responders offering few solutions and mostly sharing information about the incident.

Meanwhile, a cold snap of incel anxiety gripped parts of the board, as one anon sought advice on transforming into a 'Chad' within two months. The response was skeptical, with many questioning the feasibility of such a rapid transformation.

A high-pressure ridge of hostility toward Buddhists and atheists also persisted, marked by snide comments and perceived slights.

A weak front of nationalist sentiment formed, with some responders discussing the hypothetical scenario of Pakistan's dissolution and its potential impact on Indian patriotism.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Sparks Debate
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violent actions against low castes, including beheading, acid attacks, and rape.

The original post listed several brutal actions, concluding with "Gas low castes." Another anon responded by blaming low castes for India's poverty and poor international reputation, stating they have ruined "prestige Indian institutions." This poster claimed low castes are responsible for scams and street crime, giving India a bad reputation.

A third anon suggested that allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames could lead to them committing crimes and then blaming upper castes for their actions.

This poster described a scenario where a low caste individual with an upper caste surname allegedly raped another low caste person.

One respondent brought up a specific case of a dalit man accused of raping a 5-year-old, noting that the man's name was similar to Bhimta Rao, a figure associated with Dalit rights.

This poster observed that the dalit man's supporters abandoned him after the crime was exposed.

Another anon countered that various minorities have contributed to India except low castes, citing examples of Sikhs in the army, Northeasterners in football, and Muslims in science, arts, and cuisine.

This poster seemed to imply that low castes have not made similar positive contributions. One poster discussed reservations, stating that using them is a sign of being "dysgenic," a term implying degeneracy or genetic inferiority.

This individual described it as "total dysgenic death" and used derogatory language.

A different anon noted that the formation of the Other Backward Classes (OBC) category, which includes some low castes and fallen upper castes, was more contentious than reservations for Dalits. This poster suggested that the OBC category was more problematic.

Finally, one respondent mused about siding with less "retarded" and "dysgenic" individuals within the low caste community if it meant preserving Hindu lineage.

Another poster argued that the issues with low castes are due to epigenetics and the consequence of defending child rapists over generations, leading to higher rates of retardation and inbreeding.

articles.title: Erotic Model's Livestream Ends in Death
articles.body:
Anon described a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who was livestreaming from Italy during the COVID-19 pandemic. The model was talking about the latest news while a radio station played in the background.

Another anon shared a case from a German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner in 2004.

Anon also mentioned a 23-year-old woman who was involved in an erotic activity with her male partner, who left her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

A different anon described an 18-year-old man streaming on an erotic platform, where a viewer requested he masturbate while hanging himself. There was debate among responders about the motivations behind such actions.

One anon suggested that some people get aroused by imagining their own death by hanging or strangulation. Another reason proposed was that the brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect.

Anon also shared a case of a 27-year-old man who died while streaming on LiveJasmin, wearing a condom, after passing out and getting strangled.

Responders discussed their personal reactions to such content, with one anon stating that hanging videos make him uncomfortable, despite being desensitized to gore from a young age.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon asked how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One respondent suggested taking concrete steps such as going to the gym, eating protein, sleeping, growing a beard, getting a haircut, and stopping habits like fap and whining.

Another anon mentioned having a girlfriend and seeking to avoid making her pregnant, having lost virginity to each other at an older age. This poster expressed uncertainty about how to prevent pregnancy.

A different approach was offered by an anon who recommended dropping certain labels, specifically 'randis,' and instead referring to promiscuous women simply as such, to increase chances with them.

One poster jokingly suggested getting a vasectomy, stating it's not worth having a child in the current economy. Conversations also diverged into discussions about underwear types, with one explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings.

Some anons exchanged banter, with one being called 'fagyush' and 'faggot,' and others debating minimal censorship on the site.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Atheist
articles.body:
Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. The original poster claimed Buddhism made 90% of North Indians 'vegan and subhuman'.

Anon responded that Buddhism emerged from one person, 'cucked' the subcontinent, and was later chosen by non-Indians as a better religion.

Another anon noted that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognise Ambedkarite Buddhism as it is a political ideology with Buddhist flavour.

Anon also claimed Buddhism operates like parasitism and relies on bad faith and moral superiority. Others discussed the conversion of Dalits to Buddhism and its impact on Hinduism.

articles.title: Indians on Pakistan's Existence
articles.body:
Anon posted that if Pakistan vanished, Indian patriotic zeal would plummet. Anon responded that Indians do not obsess over Pakistan, having better things to do.

Another anon disagreed, citing religious differences and the claim that coexistence with Islam is not possible.

Anon also mentioned that low castes are a problem in India and Pakistan, with one suggesting they should be kept away from the army and bureaucracy. Anon noted Pakistan's existence apparently sustains Indian nationalism.
